{

        "property_id": "PROP-0049",
        "title": "Is ModExp gas monotonically increasing with input size?",
        "severity": "High",
        "mindset": "Formal Verification Engineer",
        "is_boundary_check": true,
        "reachability": {
          "classification": "external-reachable",
          "entry_points": [
            "Transaction"
          ],
          "attacker_controlled": true,
          "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
        },
        "test_procedure": "1. Incrementally increase base_length - verify gas increases.\n2. Incrementally increase modulus_length - verify gas increases.\n3. Incrementally increase exponent_length - verify gas increases.\n4. Incrementally increase exponent value - verify gas increases.\n5. Find any input where gas decreases with size increase.",
        "bug_class": "Input Validation",
        "risk_category": "Denial of Service",
        "notes": "Source: PROP-0049 from PROP-W1B2-1, Trust Boundary: tb-005"
      },
      "checklist_file": "outputs/02_PARTIAL_W0B1_1770355975.json",

    {

      "checklist_item": {
        "check_id": "CHK-W1B2-PROP-0050-001",
        "property_id": "PROP-0050",
        "title": "Is EIP-7883 gas always >= EIP-2565 gas for same inputs?",
        "severity": "Medium",
        "mindset": "Formal Verification Engineer",
        "is_boundary_check": true,
        "reachability": {
          "classification": "external-reachable",
          "entry_points": [
            "Transaction"
          ],
          "attacker_controlled": true,
          "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
        },
        "test_procedure": "1. Calculate both EIP-2565 and EIP-7883 gas for test inputs.\n2. Verify EIP-7883 >= EIP-2565 for all inputs.\n3. Test edge cases at formula boundaries.\n4. Verify no regression in gas costs.\n5. Minimum floor increase (200->500) ensures this.",
        "bug_class": "State Consistency",
        "risk_category": "Denial of Service",
        "notes": "Source: PROP-0050 from PROP-W1B2-1, Trust Boundary: tb-005, tb-006"
      },

      "property_id": "PROP-0050"
    },
    {
      "check_id": "CHK-W2B11-PROP-0001-001",
      "checklist_item": {
        "check_id": "CHK-W2B11-PROP-0001-001",
        "property_id": "PROP-0001",
        "title": "Does ECDSA signature recovery correctly derive sender address?",
        "severity": "Critical",
        "mindset": "Boundary Guard",
        "is_boundary_check": true,
        "reachability": {
          "classification": "external-reachable",

            "P2P"
          ],
          "attacker_controlled": true,
          "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
        },
        "test_procedure": "1. Sign transaction with known private key.\n2. Recover sender using recover_sender.\n3. Verify recovered address matches expected.\n4. Test with malicious r/s/v values.\n5. Verify no sender spoofing is possible.",
        "bug_class": "Cryptographic Integrity",
        "risk_category": "Spoofing",
        "notes": "Source: PROP-0001 from PROP-W2B11-1, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-009"
      },
      "checklist_file": "outputs/02_PARTIAL_W0B1_1770355975.json",
      "property_id": "PROP-0001"
    },
    {
      "check_id": "CHK-W2B11-PROP-0002-001",
      "checklist_item": {
        "check_id": "CHK-W2B11-PROP-0002-001",
        "property_id": "PROP-0002",
        "title": "Does recover_sender reject r == 0 or r >= SECP256K1N?",
        "severity": "Critical",
        "mindset": "Boundary Guard",
        "is_boundary_check": true,
        "reachability": {
          "classification": "external-reachable",
          "entry_points": [
            "Transaction",
            "P2P"
          ],
          "attacker_controlled": true,
          "bug_bounty_scope": "in-scope"
        },
        "test_procedure": "1. Submit tx with r = 0 - verify rejection.\n2. Submit tx with r = SECP256K1N - verify rejection.\n3. Submit tx with r = SECP256K1N + 1 - verify rejection.\n4. Verify rejection occurs before state access.\n5. Test boundary at r = SECP256K1N - 1 - verify acceptance.",
        "bug_class": "Input Validation",
        "risk_category": "Spoofing",
        "notes": "Source: PROP-0002 from PROP-W2B11-1, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-009"
      },
      "checklist_file": "outputs/02_PARTIAL_W0B1_1770355975.json",
      "property_id": "PROP-0002"
    },
    {

      "checklist_item": {
        "check_id": "CHK-W2B11-PROP-0003-001",
        "property_id": "PROP-0003",
        "title": "Does signature validation enforce low-s (s <= SECP256K1N/2)?",
        "severity": "High",
        "mindset": "Boundary Guard",

          "classification": "external-reachable",

        "bug_class": "Input Validation",
        "risk_category": "Repudiation",
        "notes": "Source: PROP-0003 from PROP-W2B11-1, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-009"

      "checklist_file": "outputs/02_PARTIAL_W0B1_1770355975.json",

    {

        "notes": "Source: PROP-0004 from PROP-W2B11-1, Trust Boundary: tb-009"
      },
      "checklist_file": "outputs/02_PARTIAL_W0B1_1770355975.json",
      "property_id": "PROP-0004"
    },
    {

      "checklist_item": {

    {
